description_long: This is a rugged, industrial-grade chainsaw with a predominantly orange metal body and a robust black cutting chain. The chainsaw features a prominent wrap-around handle for secure grip and maneuverability, as well as a secondary rear handle for added control. The engine housing is compact and cylindrical, with visible air vents and a fuel cap, suggesting a gasoline-powered mechanism. The cutting bar is long and fitted with a heavy-duty chain, suitable for cutting through thick wood or debris. The surface of the chainsaw is mostly hard metal with some plastic or rubberized elements on the handles for comfort and safety. No visible brand logo is present, and the design emphasizes durability and functionality for urban or industrial use.
description: A heavy-duty orange and black chainsaw with a wrap-around handle, long cutting bar, and visible engine housing, designed for tough cutting tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cutting chain and the wrap-around handle directly facing forward.
description_view_1: Angled top view highlighting the length of the cutting bar, the engine housing, and both handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the engine housing, rear handle, and the alignment of the cutting bar.
description_view_3: Angled bottom view emphasizing the underside of the cutting bar, chain, and the ergonomic handle design.
attribute_handle_design: Two handles: a large wrap-around front handle and a straight rear handle, both designed for ergonomic grip and control.
attribute_power_source_indicator: Visible fuel cap on the engine housing, indicating gasoline power.
